title: Departmental Overhead Rates
event: Reyes Co. uses departmental rates: Department 1 budgets $90,000 of overhead on 15,000 machine hours; Department 2 budgets $150,000 on 10,000 direct labor hours. A job uses 200 machine hours in Department 1 and 120 direct labor hours in Department 2. Compute the overhead assigned to the job.

computationPaths.narration: Halfway between plantwide and ABC: each department picks the driver that best explains ITS overhead.

memorize.body: Different departments, different drivers — machine-heavy rooms use machine hours, labor-heavy rooms use labor hours.
Apply each department's rate to the job's usage IN THAT department — cross-applying drivers is the classic slip.

questions.prompt: Dept 1: 200 MH × $6. Dept 2: 120 DLH × $15. Total overhead on the job = ?

distractors.feedback: Department 1 only. The job also passed through Department 2: +1,800.
